application_ref.description: Application reference. When only an application is supplied, the latest revision of its default variant is returned.

application_variant_ref.description: Variant reference. Returns the latest revision on that variant.

application_revision_ref.description: Revision reference. Returns that exact revision.

environment_ref.description: Environment reference. Returns the revision currently deployed to that environment under the given `key`.

environment_variant_ref.description: Environment variant reference; used together with `environment_ref`.

environment_revision_ref.description: Environment revision reference; used to pin to a specific environment commit instead of the current tip.

key.title: Key
key.description: Deployment key inside the environment revision. When omitted and `application_ref` is supplied, the server derives it as `{application_slug}.revision`.

resolve.title: Resolve
resolve.description: When `true`, resolve embedded references in the returned revision's `data` (for example, snippet references).

schema.title: ApplicationRevisionRetrieveRequest
schema.description:
Request body for `POST /applications/revisions/retrieve`.

Resolves to a single revision by one of several reference types. Exactly one
reference path is needed; the most specific wins when several are provided.
See the [Applications guide](/reference/api-guide/applications#invocation).
